description: Instructions for the user testing task are displayed on screen, explaining the scenario: imagine having 15 minutes during a lunch break to find opportunities in the app.
frame_description: A black screen with white text appearing gradually, providing instructions for the user testing session.

description: An 'Open' button appears at the bottom of the instruction screen.
frame_description: The instruction screen now features a centered 'Open' button with a small icon.

description: The user clicks the 'Open' button to proceed to the prototype.

description: The screen transitions from the black instruction page to the white loading state of the prototype.
frame_description: The screen goes white as the prototype begins to load.

description: The 'Explore' page of the prototype loads, showing sections for 'Short tasks & surveys' and 'Sessions to schedule'.

description: User selects the 'Under 10 min' duration filter option.

description: User drags the left handle of the Pay Rate slider to increase the minimum pay from $0 to approximately $81.

description: User scrolls down within the Filter Opportunities modal to reveal more filter categories.

description: User adjusts the right handle of the Pay Rate slider, moving it from $100+ down to $87 and back.
